name: com.baseprojectpackages.tools
description: A suite of Unity editor tools and runtime helpers for everyday project work. Includes project health windows (assembly graph, missing scripts, empty folders, execution order plus menu item and create-asset overviews, static reset checker), code generators for layer, tag and order constants, a data driven menu manager, unique ID assignment for ScriptableObjects, an asset zoo scene builder, a component clipboard, lighting profiles, a hierarchy sorter and an auto start scene helper.
